# Trill & Associates Advocates

> One of Tanzania's leading law firms, based in Dar-es-Salaam, providing expert legal services to individuals, businesses, and institutions in Tanzania and across East Africa.

## About

Trill & Associates Advocates is a full-service law firm headquartered in Dar-es-Salaam, Tanzania. The firm delivers commercially focused legal advice across a wide range of practice areas, combining deep knowledge of Tanzanian law with practical, results-oriented counsel.

## Practice Areas

- **Corporate & Commercial Law** — Company incorporation, governance, M&A, joint ventures, commercial contracts, due diligence
- **Dispute Resolution** — Civil and commercial litigation, debt recovery, judicial review, appeals before the Court of Appeal
- **Real Estate & Conveyancing** — Property transactions, title investigations, land registration, commercial leases, Zanzibar property
- **Intellectual Property** — Trademark registration, copyright, patents, IP licensing, anti-counterfeiting, IP portfolio management
- **Employment & Labour Law** — Employment contracts, HR policy, disciplinary procedures, CMA representation, expatriate advisory
- **Banking & Finance** — Loan documentation, security registration, project finance, regulatory compliance
- **Investment & Business Advisory** — Foreign investment structuring, TIRA licensing, regulatory approvals
- **Immigration** — Work permits, residence permits, investor visas, compliance advisory
- **Oil & Gas** — Production sharing agreements, JOAs, regulatory licencing, project finance
- **Regulatory Compliance** — Sector-specific compliance, BRELA filings, anti-money laundering
- **Taxation** — Tax advisory, TRA disputes, transfer pricing, tax due diligence
- **Alternative Dispute Resolution** — Mediation, arbitration, negotiated settlements
- **Human Rights** — Constitutional matters, public interest litigation
- **Entertainment Law** — Contracts, IP, licensing for creative industries
- **Cyber-crime Law** — Digital offences, data protection (PDPA Tanzania), cybersecurity advisory
- **Debt Recovery & Enforcement** — Judgment enforcement, attachment orders, recovery proceedings

## Industry Sectors

- Energy & Infrastructure
- Startups & Technology
- Banking & Financial Services
- Real Estate & Construction
- Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals
- Hospitality & Tourism
- Agriculture & Natural Resources
- NGOs & Development Organizations

## Location

Dar-es-Salaam, Tanzania
Serving clients across Tanzania (including Zanzibar) and East Africa

## Languages

English, Swahili

## Contact

Website: [firm website]
Book a consultation: [website]/book-consultation

## Key Facts

- Full-service law firm covering all major areas of Tanzanian law
- Admitted to practice before all levels of Tanzanian courts including the Court of Appeal
- Advises leading local and international corporates, financial institutions, government entities, and development organisations
- Deep expertise in Tanzania's unique land law framework (mainland and Zanzibar)
- Experienced in cross-border transactions and international arbitration seated in Tanzania
